subject: [SO] Add configuration about mso.infra in nssmf adpater server
commit_message:
[SO] Add configuration about mso.infra in nssmf adpater server

Today, so-nssmf-adapter need to call the api of 3gppservice in
so-api-handler, so add configuration about mso.infra in nssmf adpater server

Issue-ID: SO-3553

Signed-off-by: hetengjiao <hetengjiao@chinamobile.com>
Change-Id: If560665bcb47f8f093b55095f36b6f2f875417a9

I have found the intension of the code here.
